_comment: Local LLM price overrides, USD per 1M tokens. Merged OVER the llm-prices.com feed (these WIN), for models the feed lacks (e.g. GLM/Zhipu) or mis-prices. Per-machine overrides go in ~/.config/gllm/prices.json (the overlay wins over this bundled file). An entry activates only once input AND output are numeric — null/omitted is a skipped stub, never a $0 price. input_cached is optional: the per-1M cached-read rate; null falls back to the input rate.
